question: Give me gastric cancer related research
decomposed_queries: Give me gastric cancer related research

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Give me gastric cancer related research
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Year", "Author", "Total sample size", "Primary endpoint", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Which trials have cancer type Gastric/GEJ?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
